reforms.description: The German government has introduced the 'Initiative 50plus' to support the employment of older workers, which includes wage subsidies for employers hiring individuals aged 50 and above, as well as a subsidy for companies that employ older workers to increase their employment rates and facilitate their integration into the labor market.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating the employment of older workers, the initiative enhances labor market participation and utilizes the skills of an experienced workforce, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been actively supporting older workers since its launch.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant policy change aimed at addressing demographic challenges in the labor market.
reforms.source_quote: The government has launched a series of measures called the 'Initiative 50plus'... including wage subsidies amounting to between 30% and 50% of the wages paid for up to 36 months.

reforms.description: The federal government, in collaboration with the Länder, is financing various programs to improve access to university studies for individuals from less favorable socio-economic backgrounds, including increased funding under the Federal Education and Training Assistance Act (BAföG).
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving access to higher education enhances the skill level of the workforce, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programs are currently in operation and funded.
reforms.importance_rationale: The funding initiative represents a significant effort to address educational disparities.
reforms.source_quote: The recent amendment Act increases the amount of individual support significantly (10% or more) from autumn 2008 and will also increase the number of students supported.

reforms.description: The Excellence Initiative aims to strengthen science and research in Germany in the long term, improve its international competitiveness, and raise the profile of top performers in academia and research.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the quality and competitiveness of research, the initiative contributes to innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been actively supporting research since its inception.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a major structural change in the funding and support of research in Germany.
reforms.source_quote: The Excellence Initiative aims to strengthen science and research in Germany in the long term, improve its international competitiveness and raise the profile of the top performers in academia and research.

reforms.description: The federal government established a timetable for all government-funded innovation programmes to ensure more frequent evaluations and the elimination of ineffective subsidies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the evaluation process for innovation programmes can lead to more effective allocation of resources, enhancing overall innovation outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The timetable has been established but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a systematic evaluation process represents a significant improvement in governance of innovation support.
reforms.source_quote: Establish timetable for all government-funded innovation programmes and eliminate ineffective subsidies.

reforms.description: The government has extended the remit of the IQWiG to include cost-benefit analysis for patented medicines, aiming to determine maximum reimbursement prices and enhance cost-effectiveness in the pharmaceutical market.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing cost-effectiveness in the pharmaceutical market, the reform supports better allocation of resources and innovation in healthcare.
reforms.status_evidence: The IQWiG has been actively conducting cost-benefit analyses since the extension.
reforms.importance_rationale: The extension of the IQWiG's remit represents a significant policy change in the evaluation of pharmaceuticals.
reforms.source_quote: The government has extended the remit of the IQWiG from performing benefit analysis for new medicines to cost-benefit analysis.
